scribe.assessment: Italy faces moderate geopolitical risk with ongoing port industrial action and EU regulatory compliance pressures on energy operators. Insider threat risk is elevated at third-party service providers with privileged OT access.

Morocco's political environment is stable but North African regional instability creates cross-border logistics risk. Seerist does not assess active cyber threat campaigns targeting Moroccan energy infrastructure at this time.

top_results.title: European energy operators report rise in privileged access misuse incidents
